calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no objection by appearing counsel. The Court orders case dismissed without prejudice pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385.
Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
